features: VITAMIN C -- Revive and refresh dull, tired skin with our cooling Vitamin C Facial Mist.
MAGIC FORMULA -- Infused with Vitamin C, Glycerin & Betaine, this magic mist will help lock in moisture and boost your natural radiance.
VEGAN FRIENDLY -- Suitable for vegans, read on pack instructions before use.
Package contents: Face Facts Vitamin C Face Mist, 3 items of 100 ml each. The actual packaging may vary.
description: Product description Revive & refresh dull, tired skin with our Vitamin C Facial Mist. Infused with Vitamin C, Glycerin & Betaine, this magic mist will help lock in moisture and boost your natural radiance. Our cooling mist is packed with antioxidants and anti-ageing actives to give your skin the TLC it deserves throughout the day. Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes.We recommend you test on a small area first.for external use only. Keep away from eyes and avoid open wounds. Do not ingest or eat the product, it is not food or an edible food item.
